title.en: Ten days have passed in a flash!

content.en:
Ten days have passed in a flash!

Click!

With the sound of shattering in the dark, the formation that had existed for countless years was completely shattered by Ye Tian.

At this moment, the mystery of this Little Wind King Hall will unfold to Ye Tian.

Ye Tian did not enter the Little Wind King Hall with his real body, but first incarnated into it, so as not to encounter any danger.

After entering the Hall of the Little Wind King, there is a council hall, and the thrones are located around the hall.

"This is the Red-veined Soul Wood!"

When Ye Tian saw these thrones, he was immediately shocked.

Red-veined soul wood is a very rare material, which has the help of nourishing and improving the comprehension of the divine soul, if there is a piece of red-veined soul wood, the speed of one's usual cultivation and comprehension can be increased by three percent or more.

And these thrones are all made of red-veined soul wood, and they are all top-grade red-veined soul wood, their value is unimaginable!

"Black Wind Mountain is too rich!"

Ye Tian exclaimed.

Without saying a word, he directly asked the avatar to take away all these thrones.

Even if there is nothing to gain from this trip, these red-veined soul wood thrones alone will not be a loss for this trip.

Next, Ye Tian saw many good things in the Xiaofeng King Palace, and took them all away one by one.

In short, he will never keep anything he can take.

The Little Wind King Hall is very large, with many rooms, as well as a cultivation secret room, and even a time secret room, which can speed up time cultivation.

But many of the formations here have also failed, or have been completely damaged.

In addition, Ye Tian also found the corpses of many people, who should be the servants of the Xiaofeng King Palace, because the strength of these people is not strong, they are all some Heavenly Monarchs or True Monarchs.

These people's physical bodies are relatively well preserved, and they should have died from the attack of the gods.

Obviously, in the first big battle, a terrifying easy, divine soul attack swept across this area, and all these people inside the Little Wind King Hall were bombarded and killed.

Rumble!

The formation of a treasure house was broken by Ye Tian, and Ye Tian entered the treasure house of the Little Wind King Palace.

When he saw the treasures of this treasure house, Ye Tian was shocked, and then he realized that his previous harvest was simply rubbish!

More than a hundred pieces of half-Dao weapons, three real Dao weapons, dozens of strange things, and hundreds of millions of special energy stones should be a kind of energy stone in the domain realm, and their internal content is for True Ancestors to cultivate.

In addition to this, there are also a large number of elixirs, all of which have been preserved in a special way.

There are also countless various rare materials, many of which are of great use to True Ancestor, as well as many materials that Ye Tian does not recognize.

It can be said that this harvest is the biggest harvest Ye Tian has ever had.

After Ye Tian carefully inspected, what excited him the most was that he had also obtained many inheritances and a lot of chaotic supernatural powers, secret techniques, and so on.

Ye Tianzheng lacked these inheritances, and once he collected a large number of inheritances, it could help him create his own method in the future.

The only pity is that Ye Tian has explored the entire Little Wind King Palace, but he has not found the owner of this Little Wind King Palace.

Obviously, the master of this Little Wind King Hall should be in the midst of the battle in the outside world during the Domain Collapse Battle, so he was not able to come back.

But after Ye Tian browsed all the classics left behind in the Little Wind King Palace, he finally knew what kind of power Black Wind Mountain was.

According to the classics, Black Wind Mountain has ten kings and hundred generals and many peak masters, and there are big bosses, small leaders and small soldiers under the peak masters.

In addition, there are countless reserve soldiers in the Black Wind Mountain.

To be able to become a small soldier, you must have the strength of a god general, the small boss is the strength of the Heavenly Monarch, and the big boss is the true monarch, and he must be the best among the true monarchs to be able to serve.

As for the peak master, it must be the True Ancestor, who can have a peak in the Black Wind Mountain.

And the hundred generals refer to a hundred generals, all of whom are invincible true ancestors who can match ordinary Dao ancestors.

As for the Ten Kings, it must be a Dao Ancestor, and it is not an ordinary Dao Ancestor!

Ye Tian guessed that there must be more than 10 Dao Ancestors in Black Wind Mountain, but it was difficult to deduce more information from these classics.

"A terrifying force far more powerful than our Void Heaven lineage, but this kind of force has finally been destroyed!"

Ye Tian sighed.

The Black Wind Mountain is huge, and this ruin is just a small fragment of the Black Wind Mountain.

Even this Little Wind King Hall may just be a temporary palace or residence of the Black Wind Mountain King, it should not be a real royal palace, and it may have the name of the Little Wind King Palace, not the Wind King Palace.

That's right, the owner of this hall is none other than one of the ten kings of Black Wind Mountain, the Wind King!

"It's a pity, if the Wind King falls here and gets the treasure on his body, then it will be the real hair!"

Ye Tian sighed.

With the strength of the Wind King, it is estimated that they are all more powerful than his master, and the people in the domain are rich, and the net worth of the Wind King is estimated to far exceed that of his master.

It's just that the Wind King didn't fall here.

Of course.

If the Wind King really fell here, it is estimated that it would have been swept away by the forces that destroyed the domain realm a long time ago, and even this small Wind King Hall would not be spared.

Now, Ye Tian finally knew the origin of the blood pool.

That pool of blood belonged to the Wind King, and it was a treasure used by the Wind King to train reserve soldiers.

The soldiers that the Wind King wants must be geniuses, if they are ordinary geniuses, it will be difficult to grow to the extent of serving the Wind King, so the Wind King will use that blood pool to cultivate talents.

That pool of blood is called the pool of blood!

The blood spirit pool is to use the blood spirit to forcibly transform the body, so that people can be promoted to geniuses, and there are no sequelae.

But blood is finite, and it can't be provided indefinitely.

If you keep letting people enter the blood pool, the blood will run out sooner or later.

If the Wind King is still there, there will definitely be a way to increase the blood spirit, but the Wind King has fallen, and no one can increase the blood spirit in the blood spirit pool.

Other than that.

Ye Tian also found the formation map around the blood spirit pool, and once he studied it thoroughly, he could manipulate that formation and enter it.

In the following days, Ye Tian studied that formation here.

With the assistance of the formation map, Ye Tian's comprehension was very rebellious, so it naturally didn't take long to understand most of the essence of this formation.

Subsequently, Ye Tian took a moment to completely control the Blood Spirit Pool Formation.

......

In front of the Blood Pool.

Ye Tian came here, sensed the power of the blood spirit here, and immediately calculated it, and found that the blood power here can only supply a billion people to transform at most.

The quota of this relic is 100,000 people at a time, which means that it can only be opened 10,000 times, and it can no longer provide the power of blood.

"It seems that the opening time must be extended, otherwise the blood pool here will soon be invalid. Let's just open it once in a million years, but I can't tell anyone else about this matter, I can only personally change the prohibition here and let the entrance open once in a million years!"

Ye Tian muttered.

Then, he began to alter the prohibition, and it took a moment to completely change the time when the entrance appeared.

this day.

Originally scheduled to be the day when the Black Wind Mountain Ruins opened, many people at the Star River level were already waiting to enter.

However, as time passed, the entrance did not appear.

Day after day, the ruins of Black Wind Mountain have not been opened.

Suddenly, these 100,000 galaxy-level people were extremely disappointed.

And Ye Tian had already left the Black Wind Mountain Ruins and entered the Time True Pagoda to cultivate.

As for other things, he stopped paying attention.

In the blink of an eye, millions of years have passed!
